text: Implement valueRationale field in aim data model, MCP create/update_aim, and frontend edit/display
description: As per open aim 2d0ab64b-228e-49d2-80fc-2e43e6c5a893. Add valueRationale (free text or structured) to explain intrinsicValue, especially for root. Update shared types, backend, MCP tools, frontend. Do not auto-derive value. This supports the ASI ideation by making value judgments inspectable and auditable under human authority. Link to cooperation engine or ASI aim.
